stemHtml: What is the role/purpose of a World Area Forecast Centre (WAFC)?

options.a: A meteorological centre that provides real-time meteorological information broadcasts for aviation.
options.b: The issuing of volcanic ash advisories including height and direction of travel of ash clouds.
options.c: The delivery the best climate data sets including long range forecasts.
options.d: The distribution of information, advisories, and warnings.
